series_metadata.series_description: Monthly reports submitted by the District Offices and each Central Office Section and the Quarterly Report compiled by Central Office that is submitted to the Director’s Office.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain each monthly/quarterly report until the final quarterly report for that fiscal year is finalized, then destroy the corresponding monthly/quarterly reports. Retain the last quarterly report of the fiscal year for 4 years., Paper: Recycle
